name: Bennigan's Potato Wedges
recipeInstructions:
1. Preheat oven to 350°F.
2. Wash potatoes thoroughly, score them with a knife, and bake in an oven for one hour.
3. Remove potatoes and allow them to cool so you can handle them.
4. When potatoes are cool, cut them in half and scoop out the "meat" of the potato, leaving at least 1/4 inch of skin.
5. Spray a baking dish with Pam and place the scooped-out halves in the pan.
6. Sprinkle the potatoes with cheese and bacon bits.
7. Place the potatoes back in the oven for 5-10 minutes, or until the cheese has melted.
8. Remove from oven.
9. Chop the tops of the green onions off and sprinkle them on the potatoes.
10. Serve with sour cream.
